output.dependency: The flight route/code string appears to determine the scheduled and actual timing fields: a single airline-flight-origin-destination pattern is associated with departure, departure delay/actual departure, arrival, and arrival delay timestamps.
The earlier time field and the next time field are paired as planned versus observed departure times, with the second consistently a few minutes earlier than the first in the sample.
The later time field and the final time field are paired as planned versus observed arrival times, with the final value consistently earlier than the planned arrival time in the sample.
